Probe executed via the direct-guard-envelope harness; acceptance outcome 2 (evasion found -> accept decision recorded). EVIDENCE: block-ssh-bypass.sh keys on the binary BASENAME first (perl /^(ssh|scp|sftp)$/ at lines 40-50), gating the dangerous-flag regex behind it. So /proc/self/root/usr/bin/ssh and env/command ssh are all DENIED (basename still ssh), but a renamed binary (cp /usr/bin/ssh /tmp/x; /tmp/x -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no host), a wrapper basename (/tmp/ssh-wrapper), and a trailing-slash path (/usr/bin/ssh/) go deny->ALLOW. DECISION: ACCEPT, do not harden. All evasions require deliberately copying/renaming the ssh binary first — that is the adversarial-agent class explicitly out of scope (CLAUDE.md / ADR-024); a non-adversarial injection-affected agent takes the least-resistance path (bare 'ssh -o ...') which IS caught. The real boundary is the mount-layer ssh-agent-filter + filtered known_hosts (ADR-022 D5); this hook is PreToolUse defense-in-depth. Hardening to enumerate arbitrary path-alias shapes is classic over-hardening (ADR-019 D7 / ADR-009). Recorded as a known accepted gap.

Spike verdict delivered (full text in bead notes). CC + pi on a placeholder with iron-proxy: CONDITIONS, not a clean yes. STATIC API KEY = clean single swap (needs x-api-key added to iron-proxy match_headers; changes billing off Max/Pro). SUBSCRIPTION OAUTH = blocked via iron-proxy ALONE — two source-verified (pi) failure modes: injected real access token also expires and a static mediator can't refresh it (401, no recovery); and self-refresh POSTs the refresh_token in the request BODY to a different host, which a header-only swap misses (invalid_grant). OAuth non-possession needs EITHER a host-side refresher rotating iron-proxy's secret (keeps subscription; iron-proxy stays as-shipped) OR a stateful refresh-owning mediator (net-new mediation D4 resists) — infeasible via iron-proxy ALONE, not outright. CC path is structural inference (closed-source); the M1+M2 wall holds for any OAuth-with-refresh regardless of endpoint. Adversarial-review: REVISE→folded 3 findings (static-key header gotcha, host-side-refresher fourth option, CC-inference labeling); spine source-verified. Concretizes ADR-026 D5 tripwire 4 + reinforces D4; NO ADR edit (canonical decision is rip-cage-seqc brainstorm's). Enough to run the follow-on brainstorm. verdict:pass
